# Bank Account Levy -- How to Protect Your Money [2026]
> Bank account frozen by a levy? Learn how to release funds, claim exemptions, and prevent future levies. 2026 guide.

## About
bankaccountlevy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- When Your Bank Account Is Frozen: https://bankaccountlevy.com/bank-account-freeze.html
- Challenging a Bank Account Levy: https://bankaccountlevy.com/challenging-a-levy.html
- Exempt Funds -- Money Creditors Cannot Take: https://bankaccountlevy.com/exempt-funds.html
- How Bank Account Levies Work: https://bankaccountlevy.com/how-levies-work.html
- Bank Account Levy -- How to Protect Your Money: https://bankaccountlevy.com/
- Joint Account Levies: https://bankaccountlevy.com/joint-account-levy.html
- Levy vs. Garnishment -- Understanding the Difference: https://bankaccountlevy.com/levy-vs-garnishment.html
- Preventing Future Bank Account Levies: https://bankaccountlevy.com/preventing-levies.html
- Protecting Social Security From Bank Levies: https://bankaccountlevy.com/social-security-protection.html
- State Exemption Claims for Bank Levies: https://bankaccountlevy.com/state-exemption-claims.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
